posts.author: livhogan (Liv Hogan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It’d be nice if we could upload all item data from the CRM extension, not just text cells. It’d be extrememly beneficial if we could edit status, people, and drop down columns from the CRM exstension so we don’t have to go back and forth .

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to achieve efficiency when adding multiple new contacts into the CRM.
